messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0147",
  "title": "热门新品 RPG手游营销观察",
  "page_index": 86,
  "page_range": "86-87"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0148",
    "title": "MapleStory : Idle RPG 2025优质在投创意",
    "page_range": "87-88",
    "summary": "This section provides advertising intelligence for *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, focusing on its 2025 active ad creatives. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* mobile game, 2025 high-performing ad creatives, and the 广大大 (ad intelligence) platform.\n- **Dates:** Data analysis window (May–December 2025) and the product's first ad launch date (July 2025).\n- **Metrics:** Creative format distribution (Video: 94.8%, Image: 4.1%) and total dual-platform deduplicated creatives (137,000).\n- **Evidence & Source:** Data extracted from 广大大's Advertiser Analysis Module, filtered for newly launched or high-engagement creatives. Includes a clickable preview image/video of the ad material.\n- **Claims & Notes:** Explicitly notes that AI-generated cartoon characters in the preview may contain inaccuracies.\n- **Figures/Tables:** Features a clickable creative preview visual and a proportional breakdown chart of ad format types.\n- **Definitions & Procedures:** Not covered in this section."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0149",
    "title": "Mahjong Wonders",
    "page_range": "88-90",
    "summary": "This section provides a marketing and audience analysis for the mobile game *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看) and can answer retrieval questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities:** Mobile game advertising strategy, audience targeting, and creative breakdown for *Mahjong Wonders* (Nebula Studio); references to iOS/Android platforms and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) ad analytics platform.\n- **Dates & Timelines:** Game launch (June 2025), ad campaign initiation (July 2025), data analysis window (July–December 2025), and initial ad deployment (June 2022).\n- **Metrics & Demographics:** US market ranking (Top 10 free desktop games), audience gender split (68.0% female, 31.3% male), age distribution (skewing toward 45+), top 10 target countries (US, Brazil, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Mexico, Canada, Spain, Philippines), ad performance (1.25M estimated impressions, 92K total popularity), cumulative unique creatives (39K), and ad format distribution (79.5% video, 14.5% image).\n- **Claims & Creative Procedures:** Identifies the title as the strongest 2025 dark horse in the Mahjong match-3 genre; details ad creative structure (high-conflict narrative opening → gameplay voiceover); specifies audience-tailored production adjustments (slow voiceover pace, soft BGM, vertical 720×1280 resolution, 29s duration).\n- **Evidence Types & Visuals:** Relies on aggregated ad placement and audience data from 广大大; includes demographic charts (age, gender, geography), dual-platform ad material stacking timelines (iOS/Android, July–Dec 2025), and ad-type ratio breakdowns."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0150",
    "title": "Gossip Harbor",
    "page_range": "90-91",
    "summary": "This section covers the 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance for the game Gossip Harbor, utilizing data from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module. It analyzes high-performing ad creatives within a January–December 2025 timeframe, noting the product’s initial ad launch in February 2025. Key metrics and claims indicate that video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%, with a total of 63,000 cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms. The section defines \"high-quality active creatives\" as assets generating high new impressions or popularity/heat during the analysis period, and outlines a user procedure to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos. Evidence is presented through interactive figures (clickable ad examples) and quantitative campaign metrics derived from third-party ad intelligence platform analytics. No tables are visible in this section."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0152",
    "title": "Kingshot",
    "page_range": "92-93",
    "summary": "This section covers Kingshot’s 2025 advertising campaigns and creative assets, spanning February 2025 through December 2025. It details metrics and selection criteria, specifically filtering creatives by high new-launch impressions and elevated popularity/heat scores. The procedure utilizes an interactive media layout where clicking thumbnail images plays the full creative. Sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module, the section provides platform-verified, performance-ranked ad examples as evidence for creative benchmarking and campaign trend analysis."
  }
]

message.content: This section delivers a 2025 marketing and advertising intelligence analysis for trending new mobile games, leveraging data from the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module. It covers four primary entities: *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, and *Kingshot*. The analysis spans multiple 2025 data windows (January–December, February–December, May–December, and July–December), with initial ad campaigns launching between February and July 2025 (noting an earlier June 2022 ad deployment for *Mahjong Wonders*). Key metrics include cumulative deduplicated creatives (39K–137K), estimated impressions (1.25M), popularity/heat scores, audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*), and ad format distributions where video consistently dominates (79.5%–94.8%). The section defines "high-quality active creatives" as assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity during the tracking period. A consistent interactive procedure is outlined: users can click image thumbnails to play full creative videos. Notable claims identify *Mahjong Wonders* as the strongest 2025 dark horse in the Mahjong match-3 genre and caution that AI-generated cartoon characters in *MapleStory: Idle RPG* previews may contain inaccuracies. Evidence is sourced from third-party ad intelligence analytics and presented through demographic charts, ad format ratio breakdowns, dual-platform deployment timelines (iOS/Android), and interactive clickable ad previews. No tables are visible in this section.
